overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic neon-lit city. The player moves from open streets through narrow alleys with vibrant signage and steam effects, then back to open plazas and roads with dense skyscrapers. The scene features high-quality ray-traced lighting with bright midday sun contrasting against neon shadows.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city street with neon storefronts and elevated walkways

events.description: green car passes by on the right side of the frame
begins crossing the street at the marked crosswalk

agents.ego_description: walking along sidewalk then stepping onto crosswalk to cross the street

notable_agents.action: green sedan driving past the crosswalk from right to left

entered.detail: teal building with orange neon CALIENTE signage and red window frames
futuristic pedestrian bridge with blue lighting connecting buildings overhead
tall modern building with reflective glass facade and horizontal lines

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide futuristic city street with the CALIENTE building prominent on the right. The player walks forward along the sidewalk, passing under an elevated walkway, then steps onto a crosswalk as a green car drives past. The scene is brightly lit with natural midday sun and features sparse pedestrian activity.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow neon-lit street with steam vents and red neon facades

events.description: turns left from open street into narrower street with JACKED AND CORE sign visible
enters shadow of tall buildings, neon lights become more prominent against darker surroundings

agents.ego_description: turning left into a narrower street lined with neon signs and pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white outfit standing near building entrance

entered.detail: large pink neon sign reading JACKED AND CORE on dark building facade
building with horizontal red neon light strips running across multiple floors
steam rising from ground vents along the sidewalk creating atmospheric effect

segments.scene_description: The player turns left into a narrower street dominated by the JACKED AND CORE neon sign. The environment becomes more enclosed with buildings casting shadows, while red neon lights and steam vents create a cyberpunk atmosphere. Pedestrians are more numerous in this sheltered urban corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense urban alley with hanging red lanterns and tall neon towers

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at tall cylindrical building with red neon lights
camera tilts back down to street level to continue walking

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow alley while looking up at the towering architecture and neon lights

entered.detail: tall cylindrical building with horizontal red neon lighting strips
string of red paper lanterns hanging across the alley overhead
green neon sign reading softsys on storefront facade

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the urban canyon, the player looks up at a towering cylindrical building wrapped in red neon lights. Red lanterns hang overhead across the narrow alley. The softsys sign becomes visible on the right as the player continues through the densely packed corridor with tiled pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: alley transitioning to open plaza with large billboard and container shelter

events.description: exits narrow alley into more open plaza area with green container shelter
passes by green shipping container converted to shelter with mattresses visible inside

agents.ego_description: walking through alley toward large billboard, passing other pedestrians in the corridor

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in suit walking toward camera in the narrow passage

entered.detail: large vertical billboard featuring cartoon character with blue hair holding a bottle
shipping container converted to living shelter with mattresses and curtains inside
modern building with blue and red geometric facade and large windows

segments.scene_description: The player walks toward a large cartoon billboard at the end of the alley, passing pedestrians along the way. The scene opens into a plaza area featuring a green shipping container converted into a shelter. A distinctive blue and red modern building becomes visible in the background as the environment transitions from enclosed to open.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with modern colorful buildings and outdoor seating

events.description: moves from plaza onto sidewalk next to road with moving traffic
approaches crosswalk as vehicles pass by on the adjacent road

agents.ego_description: walking through plaza past container shelter and approaching street crossing

notable_agents.action: person sitting at outdoor table near the green container shelter

entered.detail: tables and chairs on sidewalk outside building entrance
elevated highway entrance with concrete barriers and yellow-black stripes

segments.scene_description: Exiting the narrow alley, the player enters a sunlit plaza with the blue and red modern building now prominent on the right. The player passes outdoor seating and the green container shelter, then approaches a road with moving traffic. The environment opens up significantly with full sky visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense urban canyon with multi-level highways and glass skyscrapers

events.description: camera tilts upward to view towering skyscrapers and overhead highway structures
vehicles pass by on the road alongside the player character

agents.ego_description: walking along road while looking up at the dense skyscraper canyon and elevated highways

notable_agents.action: white van driving along the road in the same direction as player
sedan driving away from camera down the road

entered.detail: elevated highway passing between buildings with vehicles visible on it
tall reflective glass towers forming dense urban canyon walls

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the player walking along a road with moderate traffic, including a white van and other vehicles. The camera tilts up to reveal a dramatic urban canyon with towering glass skyscrapers and multi-level highway overpasses. The scene emphasizes the vertical scale of the cyberpunk city with dense architecture and infrastructure overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a bright, open city street through a claustrophobic neon alleyway and back into a towering urban plaza. It begins on a sunlit sidewalk by the Caliente building, moving under an elevated walkway and across a crosswalk as a green car passes. The camera then turns left, transitioning from the midday glare into a shadowed urban canyon dominated by the red glow of the Jacked and Core sign, steam vents, and hanging lanterns. As the player pushes deeper through this densely packed corridor past the Softsys sign, the scene gradually opens up toward a cartoon billboard and a green container shelter. Finally, the camera emerges from the alley into a wide, sun-drenched plaza, passing a blue and red modern building before tilting upward to reveal a dramatic skyline of glass skyscrapers and multi-level highway overpasses.
